# Recording Artifact Notes

The virtual piano can create recordings and exported files during local runs.

## Generated Files

- JSON recording files.
- CSV exports.
- MIDI exports.
- Local configuration snapshots.
- Debug screenshots or short videos.

## Handling

Keep generated media and recordings outside normal Git history unless they are small curated examples. Use `recordings/` or an external media folder for local test outputs.

## Sharing Examples

When sharing a recording, include the camera resolution, calibration settings, FPS range, and software revision so playback behavior can be interpreted correctly.
